title: 26 By Biosemi
description: This EEG dataset comprises recordings from 26 participants during a pain perception study using laser stimulation. Participants received fixed-intensity nociceptive stimuli at regular intervals and provided subjective pain ratings on a 0-10 scale. The dataset captures neural responses to pain and associated behavioral ratings, providing a resource for investigating the electrophysiological correlates of pain perception and subjective pain assessment.
methods_description: Participants underwent laser stimulation at individually calibrated intensities (targeting a pain rating of 7/10) delivered approximately every 20 seconds for 16 trials. EEG was recorded using a BioSemi system (26 channels) while participants maintained fixation on a cross and provided pain ratings (0-10 scale) via computer mouse following each stimulus. Inter-stimulus intervals and rating periods were 20 seconds and 3-5 seconds, respectively.
